summary: Iteration 37 - Cashout Engine (Autonomous Profit Extraction) Testing Complete. All 24 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin Dashboard Cashout Engine tab verified with engine status, EUR accounts (IT+BE), SEPA routing rules, and comprehensive report.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cashout Engine fully tested. All endpoints working correctly. (1) GET /api/cashout/status returns running=true, cycle_count>=1, cumulative extraction metrics (extracted_usdc, extracted_eur, cashouts_executed, cashouts_blocked), EUR accounts (IT+BE with correct IBANs/BICs), SEPA routing thresholds (instant_max=5000, standard_max=100000). (2) GET /api/cashout/report returns comprehensive report with engine status, USDC wallets (client/treasury/revenue all 0.000000), hot wallet (NENO=396.9888, BNB=0.00483), conversion_opportunities=1. (3) GET /api/cashout/history returns cashout operation history. (4) GET /api/cashout/eur-accounts returns IT (IBAN IT80V1810301600068254758246, BIC FNOMITM2) and BE (IBAN BE06967614820722, BIC TRWIBEB1XXX) accounts with routing rules. (5) GET /api/cashout/conversions/opportunities returns 1 NENO→USDC opportunity. (6) GET /api/cashout/conversions/history returns conversion history. (7) GET /api/cashout/conversions/summary returns conversion summary by pair. (8) POST /api/cashout/start/stop controls engine (admin only). (9) All endpoints require Bearer token auth (401 without). (10) Circle USDC endpoints still working. (11) Auto-op loop still running. Frontend Admin Dashboard has 8 tabs, Cashout Engine tab shows ACTIVE badge, cycle count, EUR accounts with IBANs, SEPA routing rules, and report with hot wallet balances.
